paper_title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced Arabic-centric foundation models (Jais) and instruction-tuned variants (Jais-chat) with specialized Arabic instruction-tuning datasets (translated from English and native Arabic sources). Leveraged Arabic-specific datasets like AraNER, NativeQA-Ar, and SafetyQA-Ar for domain-specific fine-tuning
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (likely includes Arabic and English)
raw_extraction.application: Arabic language understanding, question answering, instruction following, general language tasks
raw_extraction.license: Open source (under Meta’s community license terms)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing high-performance Arabic-focused LLMs with strong instruction-following capabilities
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning with masked prompt loss (answer-only backpropagation)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Same foundation as Jais 1.3B but instruction-tuned with Arabic-specific datasets (translated and native Arabic instruction sets) to enable robust zero-shot and few-shot instruction following
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (likely includes Arabic and English)
raw_extraction.application: Chatbots, instruction following, Arabic language applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling Arabic language models to follow instructions effectively
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning with masked prompt loss (answer-only backpropagation)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of Jais with larger capacity for improved performance on Arabic language tasks, particularly knowledge and commonsense reasoning
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (likely includes Arabic and English)
raw_extraction.application: Advanced Arabic language understanding, complex reasoning tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: High-capacity Arabic language models with superior generalization
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning with masked prompt loss (answer-only backpropagation)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Same 6.7B foundation as Jais but instruction-tuned with Arabic-specific datasets to achieve state-of-the-art performance on Arabic instruction-following tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (likely includes Arabic and English)
raw_extraction.application: Advanced chatbots, Arabic instruction following, complex dialogue systems
raw_extraction.research_problem: Instruction-tuned Arabic language models with superior conversational abilities
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning with masked prompt loss (answer-only backpropagation)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Largest model in the series, optimized for maximum performance on Arabic language understanding and commonsense reasoning tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (likely includes Arabic and English)
raw_extraction.application: Specialized Arabic language applications requiring deep reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: High-performance Arabic language models for complex reasoning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning with masked prompt loss (answer-only backpropagation)
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Condor Galaxy Supercomputer with customized Cerebras model zoo
raw_extraction.extension: Dense attention mechanism with SwiGLU activation and ALiBi positional embeddings tailored for long sequences
raw_extraction.paper_title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces Jais, a foundational Arabic-language LLM optimized for Arabic-specific tasks through specialized pretraining and instruction tuning. Unlike existing multilingual models, Jais is designed with Arabic linguistic nuances in mind
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Arabic-centric large-scale text corpus (not specified but inferred from context)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language tasks, including Arabic language understanding, generation, and instruction-following
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing high-quality foundation models tailored for Arabic language understanding and generation
raw_extraction.paper_title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Jais-chat builds upon Jais by incorporating instruction tuning and additional chatbot-specific adaptations to enhance conversational capabilities in Arabic. It leverages zero-shot instruction tuning for improved alignment with human preferences
raw_extraction.application: Conversational AI, chatbots, Arabic language interaction
raw_extraction.research_problem: Creating chatbots capable of engaging in natural, contextually appropriate conversations in Arabic
raw_extraction.paper_title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a larger variant of Jais with increased capacity for complex reasoning and nuanced Arabic language processing. Designed to improve performance on Arabic-specific benchmarks while maintaining robustness across general language tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Enhanced Arabic-centric corpus with more domain-specific data
raw_extraction.application: Advanced language understanding, complex question answering, Arabic-specific applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling Arabic-focused LLMs for better performance on complex reasoning tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: The largest variant of Jais-chat, combining enhanced instruction tuning with specialized chatbot training techniques to achieve superior conversational abilities in Arabic. Leverages larger model capacity to handle more complex dialogue scenarios
raw_extraction.application: High-end conversational AI, Arabic language assistants, complex dialogue systems
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing high-performance chatbots for Arabic language with advanced contextual understanding
raw_extraction.paper_title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: The largest model in the Jais series, designed for maximum performance on Arabic language tasks. Built with extensive pretraining on diverse Arabic texts to capture rich linguistic patterns and cultural nuances
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Most comprehensive Arabic-centric corpus available at the time
raw_extraction.application: Specialized Arabic language applications, high-stakes reasoning tasks, advanced language modeling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Maximizing Arabic language model performance through extensive pretraining
raw_extraction.paper_title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models

raw_extraction.organization: Inception, MBZUAI (Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence)
raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a foundational Arabic-centric LLM (Jais) with dense attention mechanisms, SwiGLU activation, and ALiBi positional embeddings tailored for Arabic language understanding. Followed by instruction-tuning (Jais-chat) for enhanced conversational capabilities
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Text-only data (unspecified corpus details, likely large-scale Arabic and multilingual datasets)
raw_extraction.application: Research applications in Arabic NLP, multi-lingual support, fine-tuning for domain-specific tasks, and general-purpose language understanding
raw_extraction.research_problem: Building specialized foundation models for Arabic language processing and instruction-following capabilities
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning for improved alignment with user intent
raw_extraction.extension: Uses dense attention architecture with 40 decoder blocks, 40 attention heads, 5,120 hidden dimensions, SwiGLU activation functions, and ALiBi positional embeddings
raw_extraction.paper_title: Jais and Jais-chat: Arabic-Centric Foundation and Instruction-Tuned Open Generative Large Language Models
